G

GameController - Class in com.example.fasttype.controller
Main controller for the Fast Typing game.
GameController() - Constructor for class com.example.fasttype.controller.GameController
 
GameStage - Class in com.example.fasttype.view
Represents the main game window.
GameStage() - Constructor for class com.example.fasttype.view.GameStage
Constructs the game window by loading the FXML layout, configuring the scene, and displaying the stage.
GameState - Class in com.example.fasttype.model
Represents the current state of a Fast Typing game session.
GameState() - Constructor for class com.example.fasttype.model.GameState
Constructs a new GameState and starts the game from level 1.
GameView - Interface in com.example.fasttype.view
Defines the contract for updating the game's visual interface.
getCurrentLevel() - Method in class com.example.fasttype.model.GameState
Returns the current level number.
getCurrentLevel() - Method in interface com.example.fasttype.model.LevelProgressable
Returns the current level number.
getCurrentMaxTime() - Method in class com.example.fasttype.model.GameState
Returns the maximum time allowed for the current level.
getCurrentWord() - Method in class com.example.fasttype.model.GameState
Returns the word or phrase the player must type.
getRemainingTime() - Method in class com.example.fasttype.model.GameState
Returns the remaining seconds in the current level.
getScore() - Method in class com.example.fasttype.model.GameState
Returns the player's accumulated score.
getScore() - Method in interface com.example.fasttype.model.LevelProgressable
Returns the player's accumulated score.
getWordForLevel(int) - Method in class com.example.fasttype.model.WordBank
Returns a word appropriate for the given game level.
